description: Red check jacket with the shell and lining made of 100% polyester, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, mock collar with ribbing, zippered front placket, rubber printed branding on left chest, a zippered pocket on the right chest, two zippered pockets on the sides, ribbed hem, stripes on the cuffs and hemline Tech Features:Built-in washable stereo speakers in collar.Built-in washable earphone in collar.Built-in headphone jack in inside breast pocket.Swap Button to swap between speakers/earphoneMulti-purpose button to for Play/Stop(manage music) & Answer/End call (manage phone calls)Built-in microphone to speak into while on a phone call
